description: The function merges two sorted sequences of IDs into a single sorted sequence.
When merging, if the element in the 'left' sequence is less than or equal to the element in the 'right' sequence, choose the element from the 'left' sequence.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: If the merged sequence, 'left' sequence, and 'right' sequence all have the same last element, drop the duplicate element from the merged sequence.
The function iterates over the 'left' and 'right' sequences to merge them.
